---
title: "\'Three Generations- Heredity\' by C. M. Yonge"
---

## \'Three Generations- Heredity\' by C. M. Yonge

**By Charlotte Mary Yonge**

**Published:** 1895
**Genre:** Fiction (modern)
**Format:** Short Story in Journal

**Publisher:** <i>Mothers in Council</i> 5:18 (April 1895) 74-78

---

[← Back to all letters](../../letters.html)
